---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for Meridian
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you are proposing. -->

## Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who benefits, and how? Be specific — generic "would be nice" requests will be closed. -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- How should the feature work? Describe the user-facing behaviour and any key implementation details you have in mind. -->

## Scope

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Area | <!-- Frontend / API / SDK / Contracts / Docs / CI --> |
| Protocol affected | <!-- Blend / DeFindex / Both / None --> |
| Network | <!-- testnet / mainnet / both --> |
| Breaking change? | <!-- Yes / No --> |

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider and why did you reject them? -->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- Define what "done" looks like. Replace these examples with real criteria. -->

- [ ] <!-- e.g. The vault card displays APY from the live API -->
- [ ] <!-- e.g. Unit tests cover the happy path and error case -->
- [ ] <!-- e.g. pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck pass with no errors -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Diagrams, mockups, links to protocol docs, or related issues. -->
